chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acq. Appeal No.S-57 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 25-10-2024 None present for the appellant. **** On 18.10.2024, none was in attendance on behalf of the appellant; however, in the interest of justice, matter was adjourned for today with intimation notice to counsel for appellant. However, today, neither appellant nor his counsel is present; no intimation is received so far, which reflects that the appellant has lost interest in this matter. Under such circumstances, this Crl. Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
